overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a desert-edge residential district of Night City during golden hour. The scene features a distinctive circular holographic billboard tower, palm-lined sidewalks, traditional low-rise housing mixed with futuristic elements, and moderate pedestrian activity. The camera moves smoothly along the sidewalk, passes under an overpass, explores an open lot with neon signage, and loops back toward the starting point.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm-lined residential sidewalk with holographic billboard tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians moving in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket walking toward camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical structure with multiple rotating holographic advertisements and neon signage
row of tall palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
single-story wooden and stucco houses with porches and varied paint colors
wooden power poles with multiple cross-arms and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit residential sidewalk during golden hour, with the distinctive circular holographic billboard tower dominating the left side. Palm trees line the street while modest single-story homes occupy the right. Pedestrians walk toward the camera, and parked cars sit along the curb. The warm sunlight casts long shadows across the concrete pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching concrete overpass with graffiti walls

events.description: approaching the shadow of the concrete overpass, buildings become more weathered

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, navigating past groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking together toward the camera

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass casting shadows across the street ahead
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and tags

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down the sidewalk as the circular billboard recedes into the distance. The concrete overpass looms ahead, casting growing shadows. The residential buildings on the right show signs of urban decay with graffiti-covered walls. Pedestrians continue to pass by in the opposing direction, and the palm trees create rhythmic shadows in the late afternoon sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: area under overpass transitioning to open lot with neon signage

events.description: enters the shadow beneath the concrete overpass, lighting becomes significantly darker and cooler
exits the overpass shadow into an open area with cracked pavement and abandoned structures

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and emerging into a more desolate open area with fewer people

entered.detail: low concrete building with bright pink and blue neon-lit windows and doorways
open asphalt area with visible cracks, potholes, and steam vents

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the concrete overpass where lighting shifts dramatically to cool shadows. Emerging on the other side, the scene opens into a cracked asphalt lot with a distinctive building featuring vibrant pink neon windows. The environment feels more industrial and abandoned, with steam rising from vents in the pavement and graffiti covering the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open parking lot with circular billboard and abandoned vehicles

events.description: turns left to face the circular billboard tower while moving through the open lot

agents.ego_description: moving through the open lot, circling around parked vehicles while approaching the circular billboard

notable_agents.action: red vintage muscle car parked in the open lot near the circular billboard structure

entered.detail: vintage red sports car with white racing stripes parked on the cracked asphalt
rocky desert mesas and mountains visible in the background beyond the city

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide cracked asphalt parking lot where the circular holographic billboard tower comes back into prominent view. A red vintage muscle car sits abandoned in the foreground. The camera moves around the vehicle, revealing desert mountains in the background. The area is devoid of pedestrians, creating a stark contrast with the earlier busy sidewalk, while the warm golden hour light bathes the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit residential district that transitions from a bustling sidewalk into a desolate, industrial lot. It begins on a palm-lined street during golden hour, moving past modest homes and pedestrians while a circular holographic billboard tower dominates the left side of the frame. As the camera continues forward, the billboard recedes and the environment grows grittier, with graffiti-covered walls appearing before the view is momentarily eclipsed by the cool shadows of a concrete overpass. Emerging from the shade, the scene shifts into a cracked asphalt lot characterized by rising steam and a building with vibrant pink neon windows. The camera finally opens into a wide, empty parking lot where it circles an abandoned red vintage muscle car, bringing the holographic tower back into view against a backdrop of distant desert mountains under the warm evening light.
